scopeContract.rule: Every M34 queue row and inbound transfer must be implemented or mapped-consumed exactly once.
scopeContract.runtimeBoundary: Raw CFLAG remains source evidence only. Runtime state uses body.conditionFlags, equipment.clothing/availabilityFlags, people flags, social.relationships, and wardrobe route actions.
